lines.speaker: Old Miner Pete
lines.text: Well now, this old mine still creaks out a few stories. Step careful and let your eyes adjust.

lines.speaker: Old Miner Pete
lines.text: Copper often leaves green-blue stains where the weather got to it. Quartz is glassier. Turquoise has a softer look.

lines.speaker: Old Miner Pete
lines.text: A mine is a team: cart, track, timber, air, light. If one member acts wrong, everybody pauses.

lines.speaker: Old Miner Pete
lines.text: Copper is friendly to electricity. That's why bike lights and motors are happy to see it.

lines.speaker: Old Miner Pete
lines.text: When a mine quiets down, the land starts talking again. A good miner listens to both.

lines.speaker: Old Miner Pete
lines.text: Bring me the rock that looks most like copper. Guess if you want, but test before you trust it.

lines.speaker: Old Miner Pete
lines.text: That cart wheel's wobbling like a tired boot. Look first. Then fix.

dialogue_tree.text: Well now, this old mine still creaks out a few stories. Step careful and let your eyes adjust.
Copper often leaves green-blue stains where the weather got to it. Quartz is glassier. Turquoise has a softer look.
A mine is a team: cart, track, timber, air, light. If one member acts wrong, everybody pauses.
Copper is friendly to electricity. That's why bike lights and motors are happy to see it.
When a mine quiets down, the land starts talking again. A good miner listens to both.
Bring me the rock that looks most like copper. Guess if you want, but test before you trust it.
That cart wheel's wobbling like a tired boot. Look first. Then fix.
